markets.market_name: Boston Celtics beats Los Angeles Lakers
Golden State Warriors beats Miami Heat

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Golden State Warriors vs Miami Heat
news.content: Warriors will start Curry, Thompson, Wiggins, Green, and Looney. Heat counter with Herro, Butler, Robinson, Adebayo, and Highsmith.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Boston Celtics vs Los Angeles Lakers
news.content: Celtics will start Tatum, Brown, White, Holiday, and Horford. Lakers go with James, Davis, Reaves, Russell, and Hachimura.

news.headline: End of Q1: Golden State Warriors 28 - Miami Heat 25
news.content: Curry with 12 points early. Warriors take a small lead.

news.headline: End of Q1: Boston Celtics 30 - Los Angeles Lakers 27
news.content: Tatum scores 11 in the opening quarter. Close game in Boston.

news.headline: End of Q2: Golden State Warriors 52 - Miami Heat 56
news.content: Heat take the lead! Butler with a strong second quarter.

news.headline: End of Q2: Boston Celtics 58 - Los Angeles Lakers 54
news.content: Celtics maintain the lead going into halftime. Brown adds 15.

news.headline: End of Q3: Golden State Warriors 78 - Miami Heat 82
news.content: Heat extend their lead. Adebayo dominates the paint.

news.headline: End of Q3: Boston Celtics 88 - Los Angeles Lakers 85
news.content: Lakers rally in the third! James with 28 points. Game tightens up.

news.headline: INJURY ALERT: Stephen Curry heads to locker room
news.content: Curry appears to have tweaked his ankle in the third quarter. Warriors medical staff evaluating.

news.headline: UPDATE: Curry ruled out for remainder of game
news.content: Warriors star will not return tonight. Ankle sprain, severity to be determined.

news.headline: Final: Golden State Warriors 105 - Miami Heat 110
news.content: Heat win! Miami holds on after Curry's exit. Butler finishes with 32 points.

news.headline: End of Q4: Boston Celtics 118 - Los Angeles Lakers 112
news.content: Celtics close it out! Tatum with 35 points, Brown adds 28.

news.headline: Final: Boston Celtics 118 - Los Angeles Lakers 112
news.content: Celtics win! Boston takes down LA at home. James had 38 but it wasn't enough.
